title: Automate GitHub repo creation for all products
description: Script to auto-create GitHub repos for all 17 enhanced products. Push code, setup README, add topics, enable Pages. Run: ~/push-all-to-github.sh
result: ✅ Built blackroad-automated-repo-creator.sh - One-command GitHub repo creation tool. Features: single repo creation, batch CSV import, interactive mode, automatic README/LICENSE/CONTRIBUTING generation, .gitignore templates. Supports custom descriptions, licenses, visibility. Rate limiting built-in.
